item.name: Adds a third party RTMP end point to the stream

request.name: Adds a third party RTMP end point to the stream

description.content: It supports adding after broadcast is started. Resolution can be specified to send a specific adaptive resolution. If an URL is already added to a stream, trying to add the same RTMP URL will return false.

query.description: Resolution height of the broadcast that is wanted to send to the RTMP endpoint.

item.name: Remove third-party RTMP end point from the stream

request.name: Remove third-party RTMP end point from the stream

description.content: For the stream that is broadcasting, it will stop immediately.

query.description: (Required) RTMP url of the endpoint that will be stopped.
Resolution specifier if endpoint has been added with resolution. Only applicable if user added RTMP endpoint with a resolution speficier. Otherwise won't work and won't remove the endpoint.

item.name: add ID3Data

request.name: add ID3Data

description.content: Add ID3 data to HLS stream at the moment

item.name: add SEI Data

request.name: add SEI Data

description.content: Add SEI data to HLS stream at the moment

item.name: Add a subtrack to a main track (broadcast)

request.name: Add a subtrack to a main track (broadcast)

description.content: Adds a subtrack to a main track (broadcast).

query.description: (Required) Subtrack Stream Id

item.name: Delete a subtrack from a main track (broadcast)

request.name: Delete a subtrack from a main track (broadcast)

description.content: Deletes a subtrack from a main track (broadcast).

query.description: (Required) Subtrack Stream Id

item.name: Add Subscriber to the requested stream

request.name: Add Subscriber to the requested stream

description.content: Adds a subscriber to the requested stream. If the subscriber's type is 'publish', they can also play the stream, which is critical in conferencing. If the subscriber's type is 'play', they can only play the stream. If 'b32Secret' is not set, it will default to the AppSettings. The length of 'b32Secret' should be a multiple of 8 and use base32 characters A?Z, 2?7.

item.name: Removes all subscribers related to the requested stream

request.name: Removes all subscribers related to the requested stream

description.content: Deletes all subscriber data associated with the specified stream including ConnectionEvents.

item.name: Block specific subscriber

request.name: Block specific subscriber

description.content: Blocks a specific subscriber, enhancing security especially when used with TOTP streaming. The subscriber is blocked for a specified number of seconds from the moment this method is called.

variable.description: (Required) block type it can be 'publish', 'play' or 'publish_play'
(Required) block type it can be 'publish', 'play' or 'publish_play'

item.name: create Broadcast

request.name: create Broadcast

description.content: Creates a Broadcast, IP Camera or Stream Source and returns the full broadcast object with rtmp address and other information. The different between Broadcast and IP Camera or Stream Source is that Broadcast is ingested by Ant Media ServerIP Camera or Stream Source is pulled by Ant Media Server

query.description: Only effective if stream is IP Camera or Stream Source. If it's true, it starts automatically pulling stream. Its value is false by default

response.name: If stream id is already used in the data store, it returns error

item.name: get Broadcast

request.name: get Broadcast

description.content: Get broadcast object

item.name: update Broadcast

request.name: update Broadcast

description.content: Updates the Broadcast objects fields if it's not null. The updated fields are as follows: name, description, userName, password, IP address, streamUrl of the broadcast. It also updates the social endpoints

response.name: If it's updated, success field is true. If it's not updated, success field is false.

item.name: Delete broadcast from data store and stop if it's broadcasting

request.name: Delete broadcast from data store and stop if it's broadcasting

response.name: If it's deleted, success is true. If it's not deleted, success if false.

item.name: delete Broadcasts Bulk

request.name: delete Broadcasts Bulk

description.content: Delete multiple broadcasts from data store and stop if they are broadcasting

query.description: (Required) Comma-separated stream Ids

response.name: If it's deleted, success is true. If it's not deleted, success if false.

item.name: Delete specific subscriber from data store

request.name: Delete specific subscriber from data store

description.content: Deletes a specific subscriber from the data store for the selected stream.

item.name: Set stream specific recording setting

request.name: Set stream specific recording setting

description.content: This setting overrides the general Mp4 and WebM Muxing Setting for a specific stream.

query.description: Record type: 'mp4' or 'webm'. It's optional parameter.
Resolution height of the broadcast that is wanted to record.

variable.description: (Required) Change recording status. If true, starts recording. If false stop recording

response.name: Result of setting stream specific recording

variable.description: (Required) Change recording status. If true, starts recording. If false stop recording

request.name: Return the active live streams

description.content: Retrieves the currently active live streams.

request.name: get Broadcast List

description.content: Gets the broadcast list from database. It returns max 50 items at a time

query.description: Type of the stream. Possible values are "liveStream", "ipCamera", "streamSource", "VoD"
Field to sort. Possible values are "name", "date", "status"
"asc" for Ascending, "desc" Descending order
Search parameter, returns specific items that contains search string

variable.description: (Required) This is the offset of the list, it is useful for pagination. If you want to use sort mechanism, we recommend using Mongo DB.
(Required) Number of items that will be fetched. If there is not enough item in the datastore, returned list size may less then this value
(Required) This is the offset of the list, it is useful for pagination. If you want to use sort mechanism, we recommend using Mongo DB.
(Required) Number of items that will be fetched. If there is not enough item in the datastore, returned list size may less then this value

request.name: Get total broadcast live statistics

description.content: Retrieves total live statistics of the broadcast, including total HLS watcher count and total WebRTC watcher count.

variable.description: (Required) StreamId of the IP Camera Streaming.
(Required) StreamId of the IP Camera Streaming.

request.name: Retrieve all subscriber statistics of the requested stream. Deprecated

query.description: subscriberId to filter the connections events

variable.description: (Required) the starting point of the list

request.name: Retrieve detected objects from the stream

(Required) total size of the return list

item.name: get Duration

request.name: get Duration

description.content: Gets the durations of the stream url in milliseconds

query.description: (Required) Url of the stream that its duration will be returned

response.name: If operation is successful, duration will be in dataId field and success field is true. If it's failed, errorId has the error code(-1: duration is not available, -2: url is not opened, -3: cannot get stream info) and success field is false

item.name: get Jwt Token V2

request.name: get Jwt Token V2

description.content: Generates JWT token for specified stream. It's not required to let the server generate JWT. Generally JWT tokens should be generated on the client side.

query.description: (Required) The expire time of the token. It's in unix timestamp seconds.
(Required) Type of the JWT token. It may be play or publish
Room Id that token belongs to. It's not mandatory

response.name: When there is an error in creating token

request.name: Get total number of detected objects

item.name: Get RTMP to WebRTC Path Stats

request.name: Get RTMP to WebRTC Path Stats

description.content: Retrieves general statistics for the RTMP to WebRTC path.

item.name: Get stream information

request.name: Get stream information

description.content: Returns the stream information including width, height, bitrates, and video codec.

item.name: get TOTP

request.name: get TOTP

description.content: Return TOTP for the subscriberId, streamId, type. This is a helper method. You can generate TOTP on your end.If subscriberId is not in the database, it generates TOTP from the secret in the AppSettings. Secret code is for the subscriberId not in the database secretCode = Base32.encodeAsString({secretFromSettings(publishsecret or playsecret according to the type)} + {subscriberId} + {streamId} + {type(publish or play)} + {Number of X to have the length multiple of 8}'+' means concatenating the strings. There is no explicit '+' in the secretCode

query.description: The type of token. It's being used if subscriber is not in the database. It can be publish, play

variable.description: (Required) The id of the stream that TOTP will be generated
(Required) The id of the subscriber that TOTP will be generated
(Required) The id of the stream that TOTP will be generated
(Required) The id of the subscriber that TOTP will be generated

item.name: get Token V2

request.name: get Token V2

description.content: Generates random one-time token for specified stream

query.description: (Required) The expire time of the token. It's in unix timestamp seconds
(Required) Type of the token. It may be play or publish
Room Id that token belongs to. It's not mandatory

response.name: When there is an error in creating token

item.name: Move IP Camera

request.name: Move IP Camera

description.content: Supports continuous, relative, and absolute movement. By default, it's a relative move. Movement parameters should be provided according to the movement type. Generally, the following values are used: For Absolute move, value X and value Y are between -1.0f and 1.0f. Zoom value is between 0.0f and 1.0f. For Relative move, value X, value Y, and Zoom Value are between -1.0f and 1.0f. For Continuous move, value X, value Y, and Zoom Value are between -1.0f and 1.0f.

query.description: Movement in X direction. If not specified, it's assumed to be zero. Valid ranges between -1.0f and 1.0f for all movements
Movement in Y direction. If not specified, it's assumed to be zero. Valid ranges between -1.0f and 1.0f for all movements
Movement in Zoom. If not specified, it's assumed to be zero. Valid ranges for relative and continous move is between -1.0f and 1.0f. For absolute move between 0.0f and 1.0f
Movement type. It can be absolute, relative or continuous. If not specified, it's relative

variable.description: (Required) The id of the IP Camera

response.name: Result of moving the IP camera

variable.description: (Required) The id of the IP Camera

item.name: Specify the next playlist item to play by index

request.name: Specify the next playlist item to play by index

description.content: Sets the next playlist item to be played, based on its index. This method is applicable only to playlists.

query.description: The next item to play. If it's not specified or it's -1, it plays next item. If it's number, it skips that item in the playlist to play. The first item index is 0.

variable.description: (Required) The id of the playlist stream.

response.name: Result of specifying the next playlist item

variable.description: (Required) The id of the playlist stream.
